69.reason: Logical error: Function does not correctly implement word extraction per spec; fails to skip leading non-letters and mishandles delimiter sequences.

71.reason: Logical error: Inefficient char-by-char read; loop logic doesn't properly accumulate only letters and loses the last word if file ends without a trailing delimiter.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Logical error: Inefficient char-by-char read; loop logic doesn't properly accumulate only letters and loses the last word if file ends without a trailing delimiter.

73.reason: Logical error: Global 'flag' retains state across function calls, corrupting word termination logic on subsequent newlines.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Logical error: Global 'flag' retains state across function calls, corrupting word termination logic on subsequent newlines.

76.reason: Logical error: Only checks for space; other non-letter characters (punctuation, tabs) are ignored and will overwrite the buffer in the next iteration.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Logical error: Only checks for space; other non-letter characters (punctuation, tabs) are ignored and will overwrite the buffer in the next iteration.

79.reason: Logical error: When flag!=0, returns without null-terminating 'word', leaving stale data from previous calls and causing duplicate/incorrect output.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Logical error: When flag!=0, returns without null-terminating 'word', leaving stale data from previous calls and causing duplicate/incorrect output.

87.reason: Logical error: If EOF is reached after reading a valid word, this returns -1 and discards the last word. It should null-terminate word[i]='\0' and return 1 if i>0.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Logical error: If the file ends immediately after a word (no trailing space/newline), the accumulated word is discarded instead of being returned.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: If EOF is reached after reading a valid word, this returns -1 and discards the last word. It should null-terminate word[i]='\0' and return 1 if i>0.
